overall_assessment: No unresolved test-quality blocker is visible in the bounded no-context package. The round-04 gaps are covered by targeted regression and feature evidence: unique occurrence slugs after insert-before-existing updates, non-geo stream pipeline occurrence-id predicate coverage, real stream endpoint occurrence-id filtering, and deterministic validation for duplicate or mismatched occurrence identities.
recommended_path: Proceed with the test-quality lane for this bounded audit package. Keep standard CI and promotion gates separate for any later production promotion scope.
